name: Alpine Hiking & Climbing
description: Technical mountain pursuits from multi-pitch rock climbing to exposed ridge walks and alpine scrambles. Requires gear that provides warmth at belays, breathability during exertion, and protection from sudden weather changes at altitude.

name: Everyday Layering & Commuting
description: Daily use from cycling to work, walking the dog, weekend hikes, and everything in between. The jacket needs to handle British weather variability while looking presentable enough for a coffee stop or office arrival.

name: Multi-Sport Versatility
description: Gear that crosses between trail running, cycling, climbing, and hiking without missing a beat. For athletes who switch activities daily and need layers that regulate temperature across varying intensities and conditions.

name: Travel & Packing Light
description: Gear optimised for one-bag travel, bikepacking, backpacking trips, and adventures where every gram and cubic centimetre matters. Packability, weight, and versatility across climates are paramount.

name: Wet Weather Protection
description: Dedicated rain protection for British and European conditions where sustained rainfall is a given. Waterproof breathable shells that keep you dry all day without building up condensation, whether on a Highland hillwalk or a canal towpath commute.
